race.description: Alex Bussell Property Showcase Maiden Handicap
race.comment: AUTUMN KING (1) good colt who resumes after finishing runner up in his two outings in his first prep. Looks primed for this with the two slick trial wins and gets every chance with the winkers going on. MOKE LAKE (10) has his hoof on the till and on the quick backup after finishing second over this trip at Tamworth on March 2. Can sit off them from the draw and launch late. THIRTY DEGREES (9) back in trip after he raced on the speed from the outside gate with a fading sixth over 1200m at Tamworth. Gets map favours on his home track. VARAZZE (11) resumes in a winnable contest with the good weight drop. Came to the end of her prep when fifth over 1005m at Taree last November. Has a good fresh record and stays in the calculations. HARMENE (6) Flying Artie filly from a Choisir mare on debut for the Cavanough yard. Has impressed in all her trials and just needs luck from the gate.
